name: mastyff-ai/mastyff-ai
description: Security, cost, and health governance proxy for MCP infrastructure. Three-layer detection engine (regex → schema → LLM), YAML policy engine with hot-reload, real tiktoken cost enforcement, self-auditing MCP server.

tools.name: scan_security
tools.description: Scan MCP server configurations for CVEs, hardcoded secrets, typo-squatting, auth weaknesses, and command injection

configPath.description: Path to an MCP config file (cline_mcp_settings.json). If omitted, auto-discovers configs.

tools.name: audit_costs
tools.description: Audit token usage and estimate costs per MCP server using real tiktoken counting

serverName.description: Filter to a specific server name. If omitted, audits all.

tools.name: check_health
tools.description: Check health, latency, and reliability of MCP servers with circuit breaker status

serverName.description: Filter to a specific server name. If omitted, checks all.

tools.name: full_report
tools.description: Generate a complete security, cost, and health report for all MCP servers
